description: Vertical slider rendered as SVG or CSS. Features: notched track with tick marks at regular intervals, styled thumb, RED indicator line/fill when value differs from default position, label above, value below. Props: value, min, max, defaultValue, label, onChange, formatValue, bipolar (bool). Sizes: standard (~100px) and compact (~70px). Replace current VFader in SnSynthEditor.
title: SynthFader: vertical slider with ruler marks and non-default highlight
